name: long-running
description: Harness for AI Agents working across context windows — multi-session continuity, feature tracking, Verification Pipeline (7 checks beyond build success), model assignment + opus review system, qa-ui-test release gates (Gate 1 AC coverage / Gate 2 NFR / Gate 3 bug verification / Gate 4 UI control coverage), /scan-changes upstream traceability, /emit-control-spec UI Control Manifest handoff, and split-layout design-doc resolution. 19 commands. Integrates with ui-mockup, system-design-doc, qa-ui-test, dotnet-dev. See README for the full changelog.
